lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਪਾਇਆ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਹਰਿ ਮੰਤ੍ਰੁ ਦੀਆ ਮਨੁ ਠਾਢੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur pooraa paaeaa vaddabhaagee har mantru deea man tthaadte |1|
lines.english: I have found the Perfect Guru, through great good fortune; He has given me the Mantra of the Lord's Name, and my mind has become quiet and tranquil. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮਰੈ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਦਾਗੁ ਦਗਾਨਾ ਹਮ ਕਰਜ ਗੁਰੂ ਬਹੁ ਸਾਢੇ ॥
lines.translit: hamarai masatak daag dagaanaa ham karaj guroo bahu saadte |
lines.english: My forehead has been branded with His brand; I owe such a great debt to the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਹਮ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਲਾਲੇ ਕਾਂਢੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: raam ham satigur laale kaandte |1| rahaau |
lines.english: O Lord, I am the slave of the True Guru. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਰਿਦੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਤਿਨ ਕੂਰੇ ਗਾਢਨ ਗਾਢੇ ॥
lines.translit: jin kau preet ridai har naahee tin koore gaadtan gaadte |
lines.english: Those who do not have love for the Lord within their hearts, harbor only false intentions and goals.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਉਪਕਾਰੁ ਪੁੰਨੁ ਬਹੁ ਕੀਆ ਭਉ ਦੁਤਰੁ ਤਾਰਿ ਪਰਾਢੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: praupakaar pun bahu keea bhau dutar taar paraadte |2|
lines.english: He has been so generous and kind to me; He has carried me across the treacherous and terrifying world-ocean. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਪਾਣੀ ਕਾਗਦੁ ਬਿਨਸਿ ਜਾਤ ਹੈ ਤਿਉ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਗਰਭਿ ਗਲਾਢੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jiau paanee kaagad binas jaat hai tiau manamukh garabh galaadte |3|
lines.english: As paper breaks down and dissolves in water, the self-willed manmukh wastes away in arrogant pride. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਜਾਨਿਆ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਜਾਨਹ ਆਗੈ ਜਿਉ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਖੈ ਤਿਉ ਠਾਢੇ ॥
lines.translit: ham jaaniaa kachhoo na jaanah aagai jiau har raakhai tiau tthaadte |
lines.english: I know nothing, and I do not know the future; as the Lord keeps me, so do I stand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਭੂਲ ਚੂਕ ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰਹੁ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੁਤਰੇ ਕਾਢੇ ॥੪॥੭॥੨੧॥੫੯॥
lines.translit: ham bhool chook gur kirapaa dhaarahu jan naanak kutare kaadte |4|7|21|59|
lines.english: For my failings and mistakes, O Guru, grant me Your Grace; servant Nanak is Your obedient dog. ||4||7||21||59||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਪੂਰਬੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree poorabee mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Gauree Poorbee, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮਿ ਕਰੋਧਿ ਨਗਰੁ ਬਹੁ ਭਰਿਆ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਖੰਡਲ ਖੰਡਾ ਹੇ ॥
lines.translit: kaam karodh nagar bahu bhariaa mil saadhoo khanddal khanddaa he |
lines.english: The body-village is filled to overflowing with sexual desire and anger, which were broken into bits when I met with the Holy Saint.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਅੰਜੁਲੀ ਪੁੰਨੁ ਵਡਾ ਹੇ ॥
lines.translit: kar saadhoo anjulee pun vaddaa he |
lines.english: Greet the Holy Saint with your palms pressed together; this is an act of great merit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਤ ਲਿਖੇ ਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਮਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਲਿਵ ਮੰਡਲ ਮੰਡਾ ਹੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: poorab likhat likhe gur paaeaa man har liv manddal manddaa he |1|
lines.english: By pre-ordained destiny, I have met with the Guru. I have entered into the realm of the Lord's Love. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਕਤ ਹਰਿ ਰਸ ਸਾਦੁ ਨ ਜਾਨਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਕੰਡਾ ਹੇ ॥
lines.translit: saakat har ras saad na jaaniaa tin antar haumai kanddaa he |
lines.english: The wicked shaaktas, the faithless cynics, do not know the taste of the Lord's sublime essence. The thorn of egotism is embedded deep within them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਡੰਡਉਤ ਪੁਨੁ ਵਡਾ ਹੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kar ddanddaut pun vaddaa he |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Bow down before Him; this is a virtuous action indeed. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਣੇ ਦੁਖੁ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਭਵ ਖੰਡਾ ਹੇ ॥
lines.translit: har jan har har naam samaane dukh janam maran bhav khanddaa he |
lines.english: The humble servants of the Lord are absorbed in the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. The pain of birth and the fear of death are eradicated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਜਿਉ ਚਲਹਿ ਚੁਭੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਜਮਕਾਲੁ ਸਹਹਿ ਸਿਰਿ ਡੰਡਾ ਹੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jiau jiau chaleh chubhai dukh paaveh jamakaal saheh sir ddanddaa he |2|
lines.english: The more they walk away, the deeper it sticks into them, and the more they suffer in pain, until finally, the Messenger of Death smashes his club against their heads. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਪਰਮੇਸਰੁ ਬਹੁ ਸੋਭ ਖੰਡ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੰਡਾ ਹੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: abinaasee purakh paaeaa paramesar bahu sobh khandd brahamanddaa he |3|
lines.english: They have obtained the Imperishable Supreme Being, the Transcendent Lord God, and they obtain great honor throughout all the worlds and realms. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਗਰੀਬ ਮਸਕੀਨ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੇਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਖੁ ਰਾਖੁ ਵਡ ਵਡਾ ਹੇ ॥
lines.translit: ham gareeb masakeen prabh tere har raakh raakh vadd vaddaa he |
lines.english: I am poor and meek, God, but I am Yours! Save me, please save me, O Greatest of the Great!

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਧਾਰੁ ਟੇਕ ਹੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੇ ਹੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਮੰਡਾ ਹੇ ॥੪॥੮॥੨੨॥੬੦॥
lines.translit: jan naanak naam adhaar ttek hai har naame hee sukh manddaa he |4|8|22|60|
lines.english: Servant Nanak takes the Sustenance and Support of the Naam. In the Name of the Lord, he enjoys celestial peace. ||4||8||22||60||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਪੂਰਬੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree poorabee mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Gauree Poorbee, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਗੜ ਮਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਇ ਹੈ ਕਿਛੁ ਸਾਦੁ ਨ ਪਾਵੈ ਧੀਠਾ ॥
lines.translit: eis garr meh har raam raae hai kichh saad na paavai dheetthaa |
lines.english: Within this body-fortress is the Lord, the Sovereign Lord King, but the stubborn ones do not find the taste.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਦੀਨ ਦਇਆਲਿ ਅਨੁਗ੍ਰਹੁ ਕੀਆ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਚਖਿ ਡੀਠਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har deen deaal anugrahu keea har gurasabadee chakh ddeetthaa |1|
lines.english: When the Lord, Merciful to the meek, showed His Mercy, I found and tasted it, through the Word of the Guru's Shabad. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਅਗਮੁ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਹੈ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਲਾਗਿ ਬਸੀਠਾ ॥
lines.translit: har agam agochar paarabraham hai mil satigur laag baseetthaa |
lines.english: The Lord, the Supreme Lord God, is Inaccessible and Unfathomable. Those who are committed to the True Guru, the Divine Intermediary, meet the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਹਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਲਿਵ ਮੀਠਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: raam har keeratan gur liv meetthaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Lovingly focused upon the Guru, the Kirtan of the Lord's Praise has become sweet to me. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਗੁਰ ਬਚਨ ਸੁਖਾਨੇ ਹੀਅਰੈ ਤਿਨ ਆਗੈ ਆਣਿ ਪਰੀਠਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jin gur bachan sukhaane heearai tin aagai aan pareetthaa |2|
lines.english: Those whose hearts are pleased with the Guru's Teachings - the Lord's Presence is revealed to them. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਹੀਅਰਾ ਅਤਿ ਕਠੋਰੁ ਹੈ ਤਿਨ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਕਾਰ ਕਰੀਠਾ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh heearaa at katthor hai tin antar kaar kareetthaa |
lines.english: The hearts of the self-willed manmukhs are hard and cruel; their inner beings are dark.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਸੀਅਰ ਕਉ ਬਹੁ ਦੂਧੁ ਪੀਆਈਐ ਬਿਖੁ ਨਿਕਸੈ ਫੋਲਿ ਫੁਲੀਠਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: biseear kau bahu doodh peeaeeai bikh nikasai fol fuleetthaa |3|
lines.english: Even if the poisonous snake is fed large amounts of milk, it will still yield only poison. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਲਾਲੇ ਗੋਲੇ ਲਗਿ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਕਰੂਆ ਮੀਠਾ ॥੪॥੯॥੨੩॥੬੧॥
lines.translit: jan naanak gur ke laale gole lag sangat karooaa meetthaa |4|9|23|61|
lines.english: Servant Nanak is the slave of the Guru; in the Sangat, the Holy Congregation, the bitter becomes sweet. ||4||9||23||61||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਆਨਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਹੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਸਾਧੂ ਘਸਿ ਗਰੁੜੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਮੁਖਿ ਲੀਠਾ ॥
lines.translit: har prabh aan milaavahu gur saadhoo ghas garurr sabad mukh leetthaa |
lines.english: O Lord God, please unite me with the Holy Guru, so that I might joyfully grind and eat the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਪੂਰਬੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree poorabee mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Gauree Poorbee, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਅਰਥਿ ਸਰੀਰੁ ਹਮ ਬੇਚਿਆ ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਆਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: har har arath sareer ham bechiaa poore gur kai aage |
lines.english: For the sake of the Lord, Har, Har, I have sold my body to the Perfect Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਦਾਤੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਦਿੜਾਇਆ ਮੁਖਿ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਭਾਗ ਸਭਾਗੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: satigur daatai naam dirraaeaa mukh masatak bhaag sabhaage |1|
lines.english: The True Guru, the Giver, has implanted the Naam, the Name of the Lord, within me. A very blessed and fortunate destiny is recorded upon my forehead. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: raam guramat har liv laage |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, I am lovingly centered on the Lord. ||1||Pause||
